title: Google Business Profile Scraper Input
description: Configure search queries or direct place URLs to scrape Google Business Profiles.

searchQueries.title: Search Queries
searchQueries.description: Google Maps search queries (e.g., 'restaurants in Austin, TX'). Each query will search Google Maps and extract listings.

placeUrls.title: Place URLs
placeUrls.description: Direct Google Maps place URLs to scrape.

maxResults.title: Max Results Per Query
maxResults.description: Maximum number of listings to extract per search query.

deepScrape.title: Deep Scrape
deepScrape.description: If enabled, scrapes reviews, photos, and Q&A in detail. Slower but more comprehensive.

debugSelectors.title: Debug Selectors
debugSelectors.description: If enabled, runs a selector health audit and saves a report to the key-value store.

maxConcurrency.title: Max Concurrency
maxConcurrency.description: Maximum number of pages open in parallel. Lower values reduce bot detection risk.
